title: Replace softprops/action-gh-release with electron-builder --publish always in CI
description: REPLACE (not augment) the softprops/action-gh-release step with an electron-builder publish invocation. Per '## External Docs Pinned / Required release artifacts' in context.md, only `electron-builder --publish always` produces latest.yml + .blockmap (action-gh-release uploads only the .exe and breaks auto-update). KEEP the upload-artifact step for non-release manual runs.
acceptance_criteria: A new step runs electron-builder with --publish always (e.g. `npx electron-builder --win --publish always` or via npm script) on tag push / release-eligible runs
The step exports GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }} so electron-builder can publish to GitHub Releases
The actions/upload-artifact step is preserved for non-release / workflow_dispatch runs (e.g. gated by a condition or unconditional)
Workflow YAML is valid (yamllint or actionlint passes if available; otherwise GH 'View workflow' renders without parse error)
After a successful release run, latest.yml + .exe + .exe.blockmap will be attached to the GitHub Release (verifiable on next tag — acceptable as deferred validation noted in subtask_10)
No publish credentials are committed; only GITHUB_TOKEN reference is used
completion_summary: Replaced softprops/action-gh-release with electron-builder --win --x64 --publish always; split release vs non-release build paths; kept upload-artifact; documented version-bump requirement
